---
title: "`r params$title`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged
    self_contained: true
    code_folding: hide
params:
  title: "IGF2BP3 Knockout RNA-seq Analysis Report"
  results_all: "deseq2_results_all.csv"
  results_sig: "deseq2_results_sig.csv"
  ko_stats: "ko_efficiency_stats.csv"
  ko_condition: "I3KO"
  control_condition: "NT"
  ko_gene: "IGF2BP3"
  lfc_threshold: 1.0
  pval_threshold: 0.05
  samplesheet: "samplesheet.csv"
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
/* ── Custom styling ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; }

.stat-box {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-left: 4px solid #3498db;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 12px 20px;
  margin: 6px;
  min-width: 140px;
  text-align: center;
}
.stat-box.green  { border-left-color: #27ae60; }
.stat-box.red    { border-left-color: #e74c3c; }
.stat-box.orange { border-left-color: #f39c12; }

.stat-number { font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50; }
.stat-label  { font-size: 0.85em; color: #7f8c8d; margin-top: 2px; }

.qc-pass { color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold; }
.qc-fail { color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold; }
.qc-warn { color: #f39c12; font-weight: bold; }

.section-intro { 
  background: #eaf4fb; 
  border-radius: 6px; 
  padding: 10px 16px; 
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  font-size: 0.95em;
  color: #2980b9;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo      = FALSE,
  warning   = FALSE,
  message   = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 9,
  fig.height = 6,
  dpi       = 150
)

# Load libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# ── Load data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
samplesheet  <- read.csv(params$samplesheet)
results_all  <- read.csv(params$results_all)
results_sig  <- read.csv(params$results_sig)
ko_stats     <- read.csv(params$ko_stats)

# Summary counts
n_total    <- nrow(results_all)
n_sig      <- nrow(results_sig)
n_up       <- sum(results_sig$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
n_down     <- sum(results_sig$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
ko_eff     <- round(ko_stats$ko_efficiency[1] * 100, 1)
ko_passed  <- isTRUE(ko_stats$passed_qc[1])
```

---

# Experimental Design {.tabset}

<div class="section-intro">
This report summarises the RNA-seq analysis of **`r params$ko_gene` knockout** (`r params$ko_condition`) versus **non-targeting control** (`r params$control_condition`) in SEM human B-cell precursor leukaemia cells.
</div>

## Sample Overview

```{r sample-table}
samplesheet %>%
  select(sample, condition, replicate) %>%
  arrange(condition, replicate) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Sample", "Condition", "Replicate"),
    align     = c("l", "c", "c")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(which(samplesheet$condition == params$ko_condition),
           background = "#fdecea") %>%
  row_spec(which(samplesheet$condition == params$control_condition),
           background = "#eaf4fb")
```

## Design Summary

```{r design-summary}
n_ko  <- sum(samplesheet$condition == params$ko_condition)
n_nt  <- sum(samplesheet$condition == params$control_condition)

design_df <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c("Cell line", "Knockout target", "Comparison",
                "Replicates (KO)", "Replicates (Control)",
                "Sequencing type", "Reference genome"),
  Value = c("SEM (B-cell precursor leukaemia)", params$ko_gene,
            paste0(params$ko_condition, " vs ", params$control_condition),
            n_ko, n_nt, "Paired-end RNA-seq", "GRCh38 / hg38")
)

kable(design_df, col.names = c("Parameter", "Value")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE)
```

---

# Knockout Verification {.tabset}

<div class="section-intro">
`r params$ko_gene` expression was compared between knockout and control samples to confirm editing efficiency. A minimum of 90% reduction in expression is required to pass QC.
</div>

## QC Status

```{r ko-status}
status_class <- if (ko_passed) "qc-pass" else "qc-fail"
status_text  <- if (ko_passed) "PASSED ✓" else "FAILED ✗"
status_msg   <- if (ko_passed) {
  paste0("Knockout efficiency of ", ko_eff, "% meets the 90% threshold.")
} else {
  paste0("WARNING: Knockout efficiency of ", ko_eff,
         "% is below the 90% threshold. Review samples carefully.")
}
```

<div class="stat-box `r if(ko_passed) 'green' else 'red'`">
  <div class="stat-number">`r ko_eff`%</div>
  <div class="stat-label">KO Efficiency</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-box `r if(ko_passed) 'green' else 'red'`">
  <div class="stat-number"><span class="`r status_class`">`r status_text`</span></div>
  <div class="stat-label">QC Result</div>
</div>

<br>
<p>`r status_msg`</p>

```{r ko-stats-table}
ko_stats %>%
  mutate(
    ko_efficiency  = paste0(round(ko_efficiency * 100, 1), "%"),
    threshold      = paste0(round(threshold * 100, 0), "%"),
    passed_qc      = ifelse(passed_qc, "PASSED ✓", "FAILED ✗"),
    ko_mean_count  = round(ko_mean_count, 1),
    control_mean_count = round(control_mean_count, 1)
  ) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Gene", "KO Mean Count", "Control Mean Count",
                  "KO Efficiency", "Threshold", "QC Status")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
```

## Expression Plot

```{r ko-plot, fig.height=5, fig.width=7}
if (file.exists("ko_efficiency_plot.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("ko_efficiency_plot.png")
} else {
  cat("KO efficiency plot not found.")
}
```

---

# QC Metrics {.tabset}

<div class="section-intro">
Summary of key quality control metrics across all samples.
</div>

## Summary Statistics

```{r qc-summary-boxes}
n_samples <- nrow(samplesheet)
```

<div class="stat-box">
  <div class="stat-number">`r n_samples`</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Total Samples</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-box green">
  <div class="stat-number">`r n_ko`</div>
  <div class="stat-label">KO (`r params$ko_condition`)</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-box">
  <div class="stat-number">`r n_nt`</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Control (`r params$control_condition`)</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-box `r if(ko_passed) 'green' else 'red'`">
  <div class="stat-number">`r ko_eff`%</div>
  <div class="stat-label">KO Efficiency</div>
</div>

## PCA Plot

```{r pca-plot}
pca_png <- "plots/pca_plot.png"
if (file.exists(pca_png)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(pca_png)
} else {
  cat("PCA plot not available — run DESeq2 module first.")
}
```

<p style="font-size:0.9em; color:#666;">
Principal component analysis of variance-stabilised counts. Samples should cluster by condition (KO vs Control). Outliers or unexpected clustering may indicate sample quality issues.
</p>

---

# Differential Expression {.tabset}

<div class="section-intro">
Differential expression analysis was performed using **DESeq2** comparing `r params$ko_condition` vs `r params$control_condition`. Significance thresholds: adjusted p-value < `r params$pval_threshold`, |log2FC| > `r params$lfc_threshold`.
</div>

## Summary

<div class="stat-box">
  <div class="stat-number">`r format(n_total, big.mark=",")`</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Genes Tested</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-box orange">
  <div class="stat-number">`r format(n_sig, big.mark=",")`</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Significant DEGs</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-box red">
  <div class="stat-number">`r n_up`</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Upregulated</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-box green">
  <div class="stat-number">`r n_down`</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Downregulated</div>
</div>

## Volcano Plot

```{r volcano}
volcano_png <- "plots/volcano_plot.png"
if (file.exists(volcano_png)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(volcano_png)
} else {
  cat("Volcano plot not available.")
}
```

## MA Plot

```{r ma-plot}
ma_png <- "plots/ma_plot.png"
if (file.exists(ma_png)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(ma_png)
} else {
  cat("MA plot not available.")
}
```

## Heatmap

```{r heatmap}
heatmap_png <- "plots/heatmap_top_genes.png"
if (file.exists(heatmap_png)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(heatmap_png)
} else {
  cat("Heatmap not available.")
}
```

## Top Upregulated Genes

```{r top-up}
results_sig %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange > 0) %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  mutate(
    log2FoldChange = round(log2FoldChange, 3),
    baseMean       = round(baseMean, 1),
    padj           = formatC(padj, format = "e", digits = 2),
    pvalue         = formatC(pvalue, format = "e", digits = 2)
  ) %>%
  select(gene_id, baseMean, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Gene", "Mean Expression", "log2FC", "p-value", "Adj. p-value"),
    align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(3, color = ifelse(
    head(results_sig %>% filter(log2FoldChange > 0) %>% arrange(padj), 20)$log2FoldChange > 0,
    "#e74c3c", "#3498db"
  ))
```

## Top Downregulated Genes

```{r top-down}
results_sig %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange < 0) %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  mutate(
    log2FoldChange = round(log2FoldChange, 3),
    baseMean       = round(baseMean, 1),
    padj           = formatC(padj, format = "e", digits = 2),
    pvalue         = formatC(pvalue, format = "e", digits = 2)
  ) %>%
  select(gene_id, baseMean, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Gene", "Mean Expression", "log2FC", "p-value", "Adj. p-value"),
    align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(3, color = "#3498db")
```

## Full Results Table

Interactive searchable table of all significant DEGs. Use the search box to find specific genes.

```{r full-de-table}
results_sig %>%
  mutate(
    log2FoldChange = round(log2FoldChange, 3),
    baseMean       = round(baseMean, 1),
    padj           = formatC(padj, format = "e", digits = 2),
    pvalue         = formatC(pvalue, format = "e", digits = 2),
    Direction      = ifelse(log2FoldChange > 0, "▲ Up", "▼ Down")
  ) %>%
  select(gene_id, Direction, baseMean, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj) %>%
  datatable(
    colnames    = c("Gene", "Direction", "Mean Expression", "log2FC", "p-value", "Adj. p-value"),
    rownames    = FALSE,
    filter      = "top",
    extensions  = c("Buttons", "Scroller"),
    options     = list(
      dom        = "Bfrtip",
      buttons    = list(
        list(extend = "csv",   text = "Download CSV"),
        list(extend = "excel", text = "Download Excel")
      ),
      scrollY    = 400,
      scroller   = TRUE,
      pageLength = 25,
      columnDefs = list(
        list(className = "dt-center", targets = 1)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  formatStyle(
    "Direction",
    color = styleEqual(c("▲ Up", "▼ Down"), c("#e74c3c", "#3498db")),
    fontWeight = "bold"
  )
```

---

# Methods {.tabset}

## Analysis Methods

This analysis was performed using the **rnaseq-editing-qc** pipeline.

**Alignment & Quantification:** Pre-aligned BAM files were quantified using HTSeq-count (union mode, reverse stranded) against the GRCh38 genome annotation (Ensembl). BAM quality metrics were assessed using samtools flagstat/stats and RSeQC.

**Differential Expression:** Differential expression analysis was performed using DESeq2 (Love *et al.*, 2014). Genes with fewer than 10 counts in fewer than 3 samples were excluded from analysis. The Wald test was used with the contrast `r params$ko_condition` vs `r params$control_condition`. Significant genes were defined as adjusted p-value < `r params$pval_threshold` and |log2FC| > `r params$lfc_threshold`.

**Knockout Verification:** `r params$ko_gene` expression was compared between conditions using raw count values. Knockout efficiency was calculated as 1 − (mean KO count / mean control count). A minimum efficiency of 90% was required to pass QC.

**Visualisation:** All plots were generated using ggplot2 and pheatmap in R. The heatmap displays variance-stabilised counts (VST) for the top differentially expressed genes, scaled per gene (mean-centred).

## Software Versions

```{r versions}
# Attempt to read versions file from pipeline output
versions_file <- "software_versions.yml"
if (file.exists(versions_file)) {
  versions_raw <- yaml::read_yaml(versions_file)
  versions_df  <- data.frame(
    Software = names(unlist(versions_raw)),
    Version  = unlist(versions_raw)
  )
  kable(versions_df) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
} else {
  # Fallback: show R package versions
  pkgs <- c("DESeq2", "ggplot2", "pheatmap", "ggrepel", "DT", "knitr", "rmarkdown")
  data.frame(
    Software = c("R", pkgs),
    Version  = c(paste(R.version$major, R.version$minor, sep="."),
                 sapply(pkgs, function(p) as.character(packageVersion(p))))
  ) %>%
    kable() %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
}
```

## References

- **DESeq2:** Love MI, Huber W, Anders S. Moderated estimation of fold change and dispersion for RNA-seq data with DESeq2. *Genome Biology* 15:550 (2014).
- **HTSeq:** Putri GH *et al*. Analysing high-throughput sequencing data in Python with HTSeq 2.0. *Bioinformatics* 38:2943–2945 (2022).
- **samtools:** Danecek P *et al*. Twelve years of SAMtools and BCFtools. *GigaScience* 10:giab008 (2021).
- **RSeQC:** Wang L, Wang S, Li W. RSeQC: quality control of RNA-seq experiments. *Bioinformatics* 28:2184–2185 (2012).
- **ggplot2:** Wickham H. ggplot2: Elegant Graphics for Data Analysis. Springer-Verlag New York (2016).
- **Nextflow:** Di Tommaso P *et al*. Nextflow enables reproducible computational workflows. *Nature Biotechnology* 35:316–319 (2017).
- **nf-core:** Ewels PA *et al*. The nf-core framework for community-curated bioinformatics pipelines. *Nature Biotechnology* 38:276–278 (2020).

---

<div style="text-align:center; color:#aaa; font-size:0.85em; margin-top:40px;">
  Report generated by rnaseq-editing-qc pipeline · `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')`
</div>
